calendar.matters:
Motion For Approval Of Dismissal Of Action
Off Calendar Dec-08-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS JUAN LEDEZMA, MEI CHANG, NADYA CHIKANOV AND PAH YU'S Motion For Approval Of Dismissal Of Action is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
